arts.ttl: Arsenal close to major transfer announcement as 'next Lautaro Martinez' deal identified - Kieran King
arts.sum: Ahead of Arsenal's trip to Old Trafford, football.london have taken a look at the latest news from the Gunners... After two games without a win in the top flight, the Gunners need to record maximum points if they stand any chance of pipping Liverpool and putting some late pressure on.

arts.ttl: Manchester United 25-26 European Training Kit Leaked
arts.sum: The Manchester United Football Club 2025-26 European training strip will have the same colors as the 25-26 third shirt.

arts.ttl: Roberto Firmino's Arsenal clause, why Man Utd couldn't sign Luis Suarez and other agreements
arts.sum: Contract clauses are becoming more commonplace in the world of football, allowing players to cash in on hefty bonuses for meeting targets - but there have been some incredibly odd ones over the years

arts.ttl: Five Man Utd stars tipped to survive rebuild as Ruben Amorim told to change tactics
arts.sum: Former Manchester United defender Mikael Silvestre is anticipating a huge summer at Old Trafford but for the meantime, he's unconvinced by Ruben Amorim's refusal to switch systems

arts.ttl: We simulated Manchester United vs Arsenal as Premier League classic predicted
arts.sum: We predict that Arsenal could line up in a 4-3-3 formation, with their starting XI as follows: Raya; Timber, Saliba, Gabriel, Calafiori; Partey, Rice, Odegaard; Nwaneri, Merino, Trossard. After failing to win their last two Premier League games, Arsenal enter their clash with Man United on the weekend in high spirits following their 7-1 demolition of PSV in the Champions League knockout stages.

arts.ttl: Andrea Berta's transfer history assessed as Arsenal 'reach agreement' for award-winning sporting director
arts.sum: Arsenal and Andrea Berta reportedly reach an agreement for the former Atletico Madrid chief to become the Gunners' new sporting director, replacing Edu.
